description: Design for JSON-mutation CLI ops. Focus: idempotence, symbolic time preservation, error hints.

id_generation.serial_rule: scan existing clip ids with same sceneId prefix, take max serial + 1

time_input_parsing.json_object: symbolic — passed through as-is after shape validation
time_input_parsing.error: reject strings that look like numbers but aren't (e.g., '12s', '5min')

params_parsing.type_inference: number → number, 'true'/'false' → boolean, quoted string → string, '{...}' → object
params_parsing.validation: lookup scene.META.params — enforce type and range
params_parsing.error: {ok: false, error: 'unknown param: xyz', hints: ['available: text, size, color']}

error_shapes.clip_not_found: {error: 'clip-X not found', hints: ['available: clip-Y, clip-Z (use list-clips)']}
error_shapes.track_not_found: {error: 'track v5 not found', hints: ['auto-creating when add-clip']}
error_shapes.out_of_bounds: {error: 'clip ends at 15s, timeline duration is 12s', hints: ['extend timeline: nextframe set-duration ... 15']}
error_shapes.invalid_param_type: {error: 'size must be number, got string', hints: ['try --size 0.2']}

list_clips_format.human:
v1  clip-aurora-1      0:00-0:12  auroraGradient  hueA=270 hueB=200
v2  clip-headline-1    0:04-0:08  kineticHeadline text='NEXTFRAME'
